title: SSO session expires within minutes of login
description: Users authenticating via Okta SSO are logged out automatically 60-120 seconds after signing in, requiring repeated re-authentication.

title: Push notifications delayed by up to 2 hours
description: Mobile and desktop push notifications for task assignments and mentions are frequently delayed, in some cases by up to two hours.

title: Dashboard widgets slow to load on large workspaces
description: Workspaces with 500+ active tasks experience dashboard load times exceeding 10 seconds.

title: Duplicate charge on annual plan renewal
description: A subset of annual subscribers were charged twice during renewal due to a proration calculation error.

title: Mobile app crashes when opening tasks with attachments
description: The iOS and Android apps crash when opening a task that has one or more file attachments larger than 5MB.

title: Slack integration stops syncing after token refresh
description: Slack messages and task updates stop syncing after the OAuth token silently refreshes, requiring a manual reconnect.

title: CSV export truncates beyond 1000 rows
description: Exported CSV reports silently cut off after 1000 rows with no warning to the user.

title: Task comments do not update in real time
description: New comments on a task only appear after a manual page refresh instead of updating live.

title: Password reset emails not received
description: Password reset emails are delayed by 30-60 minutes or not delivered at all for some domains.

title: Calendar view misaligns tasks across timezones
description: Tasks with due dates near midnight appear on the wrong day in the calendar view for users outside UTC.

title: Google Calendar integration creates duplicate events
description: Tasks synced to Google Calendar occasionally create a second duplicate event after being edited.

title: Mobile app logs users out randomly
description: Users on the mobile app are unexpectedly signed out multiple times per day, unrelated to session expiry settings.

title: Invoice PDF shows incorrect tax amount
description: Generated invoice PDFs display an incorrect tax line for customers in certain regions.

title: Notification preferences reset after logout
description: Custom notification settings revert to default after a user logs out and back in.

title: Report scheduler fails silently for Enterprise workspaces
description: Scheduled recurring reports do not send for some Enterprise workspaces, with no error surfaced to the admin.
